title: The Knocker Sign Limiter
description: Limits signs placed by "The Knocker" to one per 20 minutes.
body:
Limits "TheKnocker mod from placing signs to a a short window every 20 minutes.  This should result in about 1 sign per minecraft day.

**Requirements:**
[The Knocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-knocker)

Bug Reports and Questions: https://discord.gg/QNR3xKuX
